name: Akaash Singh
bio: Akaash Singh is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster from Dallas, Texas, of Indian descent, known for self-released YouTube specials and for co-hosting the Flagrant podcast. He released the specials Bring Back Apu in 2022 and Gaslit in 2024.

timeline.ev: Co-launches the Flagrant podcast with Andrew Schulz
Self-releases the special Bring Back Apu on YouTube
Self-releases the special Gaslit on YouTube
